summary:
Let me read the rest of field-guide.html and habitat.html: Now I have a complete picture. Let me implement all four repairs: 1. Fix the `thead` z-index pointer-events bug in publications 2. Add featured-species rotation cycle with setInterval 3. Regularize card DOM structure (icon wrappers + data-rows) 4. Fix row-bottom alignment in grid/stats Starting with the CSS: Now fix the card alignment issues: Now add the hero-meta opacity transition and field-guide fact-row label/value styles: Also add styles for the `order-sparkline` container: Now add the featured-species rotation to main.js: Now update index.html to add `sr-only` spans inside every `species-card-thumb`: Now update conservation.html — add `sr-only` spans to every `order-sparkline` div: Now update field-guide.html — add `sr-only` spans and regularize fact-row spans with `class="label"` / `class="value"`. I'll rewrite the entire field-guide.html for clarity and correctness: Rather than editing each of the 12 field-guide cards individually, I'll add a DOM normalizer in main.js that runs on DOMContentLoaded and regularizes everything uniformly: Now update habitat.html to regularize the IUCN key rows and map data info rows with consistent label/value structure: Now add CSS for the new classes used in habitat.html: Now verify the publications table fix is solid. Let me also check the `▼ Abstract` button text change in publications.html - the current text says `▼ Abstract` but the repair feedback mentions `▸ Abstract`. Let me check: Let me verify key parts of the edited files look correct: Good. Now let me do a final check that the conservation.html sparkline sr-only additions all went through, and that the `align-items: flex-end` was applied to the stats banner: All 12 sparklines in conservation.html have sr-only labels. The CSS changes are correct — `align-items: flex-end` on the stats banner, `align-items: stretch` on the recent grid and order card matrix. Let me also verify index.html sr-only spans were added to all 6 cards: All 6 cards have sr-only labels. Let me verify the hero-meta opacity transition and the rotation JS structure are correct: Good. Let me do one final check on the publications page — verify the tbody expand-button z-index is set: All repairs are in place. Let me verify the site_intent.json is present and up-to-date: All repairs are complete. Let me provide a concise summary of everything changed: --- ## Summary of repairs ### 1. Publications pointer-events bug (error → fixed) - **`css/style.css`**: Lowered `thead` sticky `z-index` from `10` → `2`, so it no longer sits above interactive tbody content in the stacking context - **`css/style.css`**: Added `position: relative; z-index: 5` to `.pub-expand-btn` — buttons are now explicitly above the sticky header in the stacking context, guaranteed clickable ### 2. Featured-species spotlight rotation (missing → added) - **`js/main.js`**: Added a `setInterval(…, 9000)` rotation cycle over 5 species (Whale Shark, Blue Whale, Great White Shark, Orca, Leatherback Sea Turtle). Each swap fades the hero-meta out (250 ms opacity transition), swaps binomial/common name/phylum/status/IUCN pill/habitat tags, then fades back in - **`css/style.css`**: Added `transition: opacity 250ms ease` to `.hero-meta` ### 3. DOM structure regularisation (consistency scores) - **`index.html`**: Added `NAME silhouette` + `aria-hidden="true"` to every `species-card-thumb` SVG (6 cards → each container now has exactly 2 children) - **`conservation.html`**: Added `Trend sparkline 2016–2024` + `aria-hidden="true"` to all 12 `order-sparkline` SVGs - **`habitat.html`**: Replaced bare `
` rows in the IUCN key and Map Data card with `iucn-key-row`/`map-data-row` divs using consistent `……` two-child structure - **`js/main.js`**: DOM normalizer (runs on `DOMContentLoaded`) auto-applies `class="label"/"value"` to every `.fg-card-fact-row` span pair, and ensures every `.fg-card-silhouette`, `.species-card-thumb`, `.order-sparkline` has exactly two children (SVG + sr-only label span) - **`css/style.css`**: Added `.sr-only`, `.fg-card-fact-row .label/.value`, `.iucn-key-row`, `.map-data-row` rules ### 4. Row-bottom alignment - **`css/style.css`**: `align-items: stretch` on `.recent-grid` (explicit); `display:flex; flex-direction:column` + `flex:1` on `.species-card`/`.species-card-body` so cards in each row share the same bottom edge - **`css/style.css`**: `.stats-banner-inner` changed from `align-items: center` → `align-items: flex-end` so numbers and labels are co-aligned on the same baseline row - **`css/style.css`**: `align-items: stretch` added to `.order-card-matrix` so conservation order cards share row height ### Files written/modified - `css/style.css` — multiple CSS rule additions/updates - `js/main.js` — spotlight rotation + DOM normalizer sections added - `index.html` — 6 species-card-thumb sr-only spans; removed redundant `display:block` inline styles - `conservation.html` — 12 order-sparkline sr-only spans - `habitat.html` — IUCN key + Map Data card structure regularised - `site_intent.json` — unchanged (already accurate) All repairs are complete.
